title: What kind of TV shows you think the EVA characters watch
display_title: What kind of TV shows you think the EVA characters watch
wikitext:
[]: What kind of TV shows you think the EVA characters watch?             Quote Post by Kaworu-chan » Wed Mar 17, 2010 11:52 pm I don't know why but I see Shinji as someone who watches Hannah Montana or some other Disney Channel shows. I also think Asuka likes watching reality shows, and Rei probably nothing since she doesn't care too much about luxuries. What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Mar 18, 2010 12:05 am The only thing Kaji uses the TV for is background noise for when he's sleuthin on teh interwebz. He just keeps replaying worn-out VHS tapes of The Prisoner over and over. Makoto watches Neon Genesis: Evangelion on laserdisc. And SDF-Macross on VHS. Gendo doesn't watch TV. Fuyutsuki probably wouldn't even own one. But both of them have high-tech cell phones that have cameras in them, and they take obnoxious pictures of one another drunk and send them at inopportune moments as a form of one-upmanship.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Mar 18, 2010 12:11 am The SEELE members obviously watch Lost.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Thu Mar 18, 2010 12:33 am Asuka secretly watches some incredibly childish show like Where's Waldo or The Teletubbies. Whenever someone enters the room, she hastily changes the channel and glances around shiftily. Rei isn't allowed to watch television, since the only time she did, she took all the advertisements literally and kept telling Gendo that his life and sanity depended on buying Osaka Brand Detergent.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Thu Mar 18, 2010 2:54 am It's Japan in the nineties, which means Twin Peaks is still pretty popular. Shinji secretly wishes he could be as capable and charismatic as Agent Cooper, Asuka can relate to Laura Palmer suffocating on her hidden demons, and Kensuke and Toji both talk about how much they want to bone Audrey Horne. Same old, same old.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Mar 18, 2010 3:00 am Dr. Phil

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Mar 18, 2010 3:00 am Except for the fact that it takes place in 2015, which means it's not really the nineties at all. I do agree with Luc though, Asuka is definitely the guilty pleasures type, and Rei doesn't watch TV at all. Shinji probably watches lots of documentaries because that was all his teacher watched, and (random character here) Hikari watches lots of shoujo series, especially the kind where the girl gets the jock who doesn't even know she's in love with him.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Thu Mar 18, 2010 4:47 am Kaji is most likely a fan of Inland Empire . Ritsuko watches Lifetime movies, and Asuka happens to be the only Werner Herzog fan. That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Thu Mar 18, 2010 7:39 am I wonder who out of the Eva cast would watch QI?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Mar 18, 2010 11:46 am Shinji watches nothing but porn. Gendo watches nothing but porn. Asuka watches nothing but porn. Ritsuko watches nothing but porn. Rei is a porn star, but does not watch her own videos. Misato and Kaji watch porn together. Toji and Kensuke make porn videos together.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Mar 18, 2010 12:45 pm Shinji would watch Gundam, and take notes. Amuro: Not even my father hit me! Shinji: *scribbles on notepad*

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Thu Mar 18, 2010 2:11 pm Shiro Tokita is a huge fan of super robot shows, and upon realizing that Tokyo-3 was being attacked by giant monsters, realized it was his one and only chance to build one.

[]: Re: What kind of TV shows you think the EVA characters watch             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Mar 18, 2010 4:35 pm id say these about fit the budget Shinji: comedy, game shows, anime Asuka: reality TV, sopa operas, fighting Rei: has no real intrest, she seems more like a reader. Misato: news, soap operas, cooking shows (we all know she needed it.) gendo: comedy, news, the NERV security tapes (seems like he would want to know what his workers were up too.) fuyuski: same as Rei ritsuko: nature shows, tech shows thats all i can think of.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Fri Mar 19, 2010 1:22 am Let's see what we have here... Shinji: MTV Japan (because he listens to music so often), documentaries, anime Asuka: US movies and TV shows on WOWOW (Japan's answer to HBO), especially soap operas (the new 90210, The OC, Smallville, Desperate Housewives, etc.), reality TV (she loves the dramu), reruns of Dawson's Creek, and South Park. Rei: no, she's a bookworm; treats a German genetic engineering book as if it was a paperback novel. Misato: sitcoms, oddball contests, news, documentaries Ritsuko: Grey's Anatomy and other medical-related TV shows (the ones she could connect to).

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Fri Mar 19, 2010 1:56 am Hyuga - BET

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 19, 2010 2:04 am Uriel Septim VII wrote: Hyuga - BET

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Mar 19, 2010 2:35 am Shinji- PBS music specials......and then turns it to a cable porn channel when nobody is around. Asuka- Shows about fashion and trends Rei- Infomercials and Scientific lectures on local educational television networks Misato- Dating tip shows Ritsuko- Lifetime movies and Law & Order Kaji- Action movies and James Bond marathons Gendo- House Fuyutsuki- The Andy Griffith Show Toji- UFC and games on ESPN Hikari- Food Network specials Kensuke- Military documentaries and mecha anime marathons

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:27 pm Nah, poor Misato can't watch anything, 'cause Pen-Pen's got the thing permanently tuned to Woody Woodpecker cartoons.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:56 pm They all watch Videodrome.

[]:             Quote Post by kirri » Sat Mar 20, 2010 3:16 pm I think Asuka would watch a lot of mecha and action-oriented shows since she's so obsessed with her Eva and fighting.
summary:
[]: What kind of TV shows you think the EVA characters watch?             Quote Post by Kaworu-chan » Wed Mar 17, 2010 11:52 pm I don't know why but I see Shinji as someone who watches Hannah Montana or some other Disney Channel shows. I also think Asuka likes watching reality shows, and Rei probably nothing since she doesn't care too much about luxuries. What do you think?

[]:          &nbsp
